Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The user wants a Python script using the pm4py library to construct a POWL Partially Ordered Workflow Language model representing a specific telecom network provisioning process

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Scenario Step by Step Step 1 Start with Service Request SR After SR Contract Setup CS must be done So SR CS Step 2 After CS two tasks run in parallel Datacenter Allocation DA and Access Control Initialization ACI No order between them So CS DA and CS ACI Step 3 After DA and ACI both done loop Base Network Configuration BNC followed by optional Debug Reconfigure DR This is a loop structure BNC D R Step 4 After loop exclusive choice Containerized Deployment CD or Monolithic Deployment MD XOR Step 5 After XOR QA and SA concurrent Step 6 QA SA to GLA
